title: CreateFunctionRequest
description: Request body for creating a Lambda function

FunctionName.description: The name of the Lambda function (1-64 characters). Can also specify an ARN.

Runtime.description: The identifier of the function's runtime. Required for .zip file deployment packages.

Role.description: The ARN of the function's execution role

Handler.description: The name of the function handler (e.g. index.handler)

Publish.description: Set to true to publish the first version of the function

KMSKeyArn.description: ARN of the KMS key to encrypt environment variables

Tags.description: Key-value pairs for tagging the function

Layers.description: A list of function layer ARNs (with version) to add to the function's execution environment. Up to five layers.
